title: Proshare Report Reinforces FUGAZE Concept, Names Top Tier 1 Banks - FinancialEDGE
description: The Proshare Tier 1 Bank Third Edition Report has reinforced the FUGAZE concept, a classification coined by Afrinvest to group Nigeria's top banks. The report's Proshare Bank Strength Index (PBSI) evaluated banks based on audited financial statements for 2023 and identified Access Corp, Zenith Bank, FBNH, ETI, UBA, and GTCO as Tier 1 Banks in
html: The Proshare Tier 1 Bank Third Edition Report has reinforced the FUGAZE concept, a classification coined by Afrinvest to group Nigeria’s top banks.
